name: Framer AI
primaryUse: AI-first website builder with Wireframer & Workshop - generates responsive layouts and interactive components from prompts
superpower: Minutes to live website: AI generates production-ready layouts with built-in analytics, A/B testing, and mobile-first design
limitation: Learning curve for advanced features; pricing scales with site complexity; best for design-first approach
bestFor: Creating production-ready websites quickly with built-in analytics
pricing: Free plan available; Mini $5/mo; Basic $15/mo; Pro $25/mo

name: Webflow AI
primaryUse: AI-powered site builder with design system generation, smart responsiveness, and accessibility checking
superpower: Design system automation: AI suggests colors, typography, buttons optimized for UI/UX standards with accessibility built-in
limitation: Can be expensive for advanced features; AI in beta; requires Webflow familiarity for deep customization
bestFor: Building accessible websites with automated design systems

name: Relume
primaryUse: AI sitemap & wireframe generator with component library - exports to Webflow/Figma/React
superpower: Instant sitemap & wireframes: Exports to multiple platforms with AI copywriting and ready-to-use component library
limitation: Not a hosted builder - requires export to Webflow/Figma; focuses on planning phase, not full implementation
bestFor: Rapid wireframing and sitemap generation with multi-platform export

name: Cursor AI
primaryUse: Full IDE built on VS Code with AI integration - supports Claude 3.5, GPT-4o, GPT-5. Multi-file editing with Composer
superpower: Superior codebase context: Understands entire project with Composer for multi-file edits, model flexibility (GPT-5, Claude 4.5)
limitation: Editor flexibility limited (Cursor only); $20/month price point; developing enterprise compliance
bestFor: Professional developers needing full codebase context and multi-file editing

name: v0.dev
primaryUse: AI UI generator by Vercel - creates React components with Tailwind CSS and ShadCN from natural language prompts
superpower: React + Tailwind mastery: Instant UI generation with real-time iteration, publishes to shareable URLs
limitation: Front-end only - no backend generation; requires Next.js knowledge for complex apps; iteration can be slow
bestFor: Rapid React + Tailwind component generation with instant previews
pricing: Free tier with limited generations; Premium plans for unlimited

name: Replit Agent
primaryUse: AI coding assistant in Replit cloud IDE - plans, writes, runs code, manages dependencies, deploys apps
superpower: End-to-end automation: Installs dependencies, manages files, deploys apps - true agentic coding assistant
limitation: Cloud IDE dependency; limited to languages Replit supports; agentic features still evolving
bestFor: Full-stack prototyping with automated deployment and dependency management

name: ChatGPT-4o Canvas
primaryUse: Code generation with visual interface - edit, comment, port to different languages, review code inline
superpower: Visual code editing: Edit inline, port languages, review code, explain specific lines - integrated canvas interface
limitation: Requires ChatGPT Plus subscription; canvas feature still in beta; limited to supported languages
bestFor: Visual code editing with inline explanations and language porting

name: Claude AI
primaryUse: AI for code generation, debugging, refactoring - excels at explaining complex code and following detailed specs
superpower: Code explanation expert: Best for understanding complex code, detailed specifications, natural language to code
limitation: Not as specialized for web dev as Cursor; requires iterative prompting for complex tasks
bestFor: Understanding complex code and following detailed specifications

name: GitHub Copilot
primaryUse: AI autocomplete & chat for coding - excellent GitHub integration, works across multiple editors
superpower: GitHub ecosystem king: Seamless integration with GitHub workflows, PR assistance, works in multiple editors
limitation: Tied to Microsoft models; limited multi-file context vs Cursor; basic terminal integration
bestFor: GitHub-centric workflows with multi-editor support

name: Bolt.new
primaryUse: Browser-based AI development with WebContainers - scaffold full-stack apps from prompts, no local setup
superpower: Zero setup required: Full-stack development in browser with WebContainers, offline work, instant deployment
limitation: JavaScript/Node.js focused; complex non-JS stacks unsupported; rapid prototyping strength but not production-scale
bestFor: Quick prototyping without local setup or installation
pricing: Free tier; Paid plans for advanced features

name: Lovable.dev
primaryUse: Chat-based AI platform for building web apps - direct Figma integration, natural language to functional apps
superpower: Figma to app instantly: Direct import of Figma designs to functional apps via chat, enterprise-ready
limitation: Relatively new platform; enterprise features still developing; best for internal tools & prototypes
bestFor: Converting Figma designs to functional applications
pricing: Free to start; Pro plans available

name: Midjourney
primaryUse: AI image generation for web design assets - abstract images, UI elements, backgrounds, stock photography
superpower: Premium web assets: Generates abstract backgrounds, UI elements, icons, vector illustrations for high-end designs
limitation: Requires prompt engineering skill; subscription cost; can't generate exact brand-specific assets
bestFor: Creating unique design assets and abstract backgrounds

name: DALL-E 3
primaryUse: AI image generator by OpenAI - creates visuals from text prompts, integrated with ChatGPT
superpower: Integrated creation: Built into ChatGPT, creates UI mockups, logos, blog images, social media graphics
limitation: Only via ChatGPT Plus/Team; sometimes adds unwanted text to images; needs iteration for perfect results
bestFor: Quick image generation integrated with ChatGPT workflow

name: Copy.ai
primaryUse: AI copywriting with workflow automation - generates blog posts, ads, emails, social media content
superpower: Workflow automation: API integration with no-code tools, creates blog outlines and social hooks automatically
limitation: Learning curve for automation features; requires API integration for advanced workflows
bestFor: Automated content workflows and bulk copywriting

name: Jasper AI
primaryUse: AI marketing copy generator - templates for landing pages, ads, blogs, brand voice customization
superpower: Marketing focus: Landing page creator, team collaboration, brand voice guides, full campaign copy
limitation: Higher price point; can produce generic copy without brand voice training; needs human editing
bestFor: Marketing campaigns with brand voice consistency

name: Notion AI
primaryUse: AI writing assistant in Notion - generates blog posts, outlines, summaries, SEO headlines
superpower: Native integration: Works directly in Notion workspace, SEO headlines, blog posts, content summarization
limitation: Limited to text content; can't generate images natively; requires Notion workspace
bestFor: Content creation within Notion workspace

name: Locofy.ai
primaryUse: Figma/XD to code converter using Large Design Models - exports React, Vue, HTML with component mapping
superpower: Large Design Models: Trained on millions of designs, automatically maps custom components, smart suggestions
limitation: Export code needs cleanup; works best with design systems; Figma plugin dependency
bestFor: Converting Figma designs to production code

name: TeleportHQ
primaryUse: Design-to-code platform - converts Figma to HTML, CSS, React, Vue with responsive design
superpower: Multi-framework export: HTML, React, Vue - drag-and-drop editor with custom code scripts
limitation: Generated code needs refinement; best for simple to medium complexity; requires design knowledge
bestFor: Multi-framework code export from Figma

name: Anima
primaryUse: Figma to React/HTML exporter - generates developer-friendly code with props and components
superpower: Component-level export: Copy React code for specific elements, works with design systems
limitation: Component-focused, not full-page exports ideal; React-centric; Dev Mode integration preferred
bestFor: Component-level React code export
pricing: Free for basic; Pro plans for advanced features

name: UX Pilot
primaryUse: AI wireframe & UI generator Figma plugin - text-to-UI with editable frames
superpower: Rapid prototyping: Generates wireframes and high-fidelity screens from prompts or references
limitation: Figma plugin dependency; may need design refinement; Premium tier for unlimited generations
bestFor: Rapid UI prototyping within Figma

name: Banani
primaryUse: Design copilot for Figma - generates app UI from text, mixes components from other apps
superpower: Component mixing: Combines elements from existing apps to create unique interfaces in minutes
limitation: Premium features $20/month; requires understanding of UI patterns; outputs need designer review
bestFor: Mixing UI patterns from existing apps

name: FigPilot
primaryUse: ChatGPT & DALL-E integration for Figma - AI assistance directly in design workflow
superpower: Dual AI power: Access both ChatGPT text and DALL-E images within Figma design workflow
limitation: Basic compared to specialized tools; limited to ChatGPT/DALL-E models within Figma
bestFor: AI-assisted design within Figma workflow
